caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a white shirt with a gold tie and a red bow tie, along with a distinctive hat that has a spiky, silver design. The man also has on headphones and glasses, suggesting he is engaged in an audio recording session. The background is filled with framed photographs and memorabilia, indicating a personal or professional space dedicated to the show. A mannequin dressed in a black outfit is visible in the background, adding to the eclectic decor. The man appears to be speaking into the microphone, possibly addressing an audience or discussing a topic related to the show's theme.
